channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada Wins Bronze in Mixed Relay at World Triathlon Cup in Chengdu
item.description: A team of four Canadian triathletes secured a bronze medal in the mixed relay at the World Triathlon Cup held in Chengdu, China. The team included Tyler Mislawchuk of Oak Bluff, Manitoba, Montreal’s I...

item.title: Government Proposes New Taxes on Phones, Gambling, and Scrap Metal in 2026 Finance Bill
item.description: On Monday, May 11, Kenyan national newspapers reported on two major developments. First, Kenya co-hosted the Africa Forward Summit with France, during which President William Ruto and French President...

item.title: Lorna Luxe honours late husband by wearing her wedding dress at the 2026 BAFTA TV Awards
item.description: Lorna Luxe, 43, paid a heartfelt tribute to her late husband John by wearing the Amanda Wakeley gown from their 2010 wedding in New York at the 2026 BAFTA TV Awards at London's Royal Festival Hall. Jo...

item.title: Highlights from the 2026 Bafta TV Awards Red Carpet
item.description: The 2026 Bafta TV Awards marked a celebration of the finest British television over the past year, drawing an array of stars and notable personalities to the red carpet. Attendees included Aimee Lou W...

item.title: Advocates Urge Stronger Awareness and Support for Lupus Patients in Nigeria
item.description: On World Lupus Day 2026, stakeholders, health experts, and lupus patients in Abuja, Nigeria, called for increased awareness, better diagnosis, financial support, and improved healthcare services for t...

item.title: Top News Roundup From Nigeria for Monday, 11th May, 2026
item.description: Good morning, Naija people. Today we dey look the main gist wey dey make news for Nigeria on Monday, 11th May, 2026. Rivers State Governor, Siminalayi Fubara, vex well-well as e waka comot from APC sc...

item.title: Analysis of Anti-Wind Campaigns in Sweden Amid High Clean Energy Usage
item.description: Sweden currently produces 99% of its electricity from clean energy sources, positioning itself as a leader in sustainable energy. Despite this achievement, wind power in the country has been facing a ...

item.title: PM Modi commemorates 1998 Pokhran nuclear tests on National Technology Day highlighting scientific achievements
item.description: On National Technology Day, Prime Minister Narendra Modi extended greetings to the nation while remembering the historic events of May 11, 1998, when India successfully carried out nuclear tests at th...

item.title: Chennai artistes organise benefit concerts to aid injured rapper Devoid
item.description: In Chennai, the city’s independent music community has rallied together in an inspiring demonstration of solidarity to support rapper Devoid (Dev Anand), who suffered critical injuries in a recent roa...

item.title: VAR Disallows Callum Wilson’s Late Goal as West Ham Lose Out Against Arsenal
item.description: In a dramatic late twist during the Premier League clash between West Ham United and Arsenal, Callum Wilson’s late equaliser was disallowed following a thorough VAR review. Wilson had scored shortly a...

item.title: Tropical Depression Caloy weakens over Philippine Sea, unlikely to affect the country
item.description: As of Monday morning, May 11, 2026, Tropical Depression Caloy, also internationally known as Hagupit, continues to move west-northwest over the Philippine Sea. According to PAGASA, the state weather b...

item.title: Mother’s Day 2026 Celebrations in Saskatoon Highlight Community Events and Family Fun
item.description: Mother’s Day 2026 in Saskatoon offered a delightful day for families across the city, with several events celebrating mothers and their contributions. The day began with engageHER, a wellness and fitn...

item.title: Thembisani Mntungwa honours late mother during graduation ceremony
item.description: During a deeply emotional graduation ceremony, Thembisani Mntungwa paid tribute to his late mother, Nondumiso Mntungwa, who passed away just weeks prior. Holding up a T-shirt with a heartfelt message,...

item.title: Citizens demand effective municipal service delivery over symbolic gestures
item.description: The article by Edith Phaswana highlights a growing concern in South African municipalities, where leadership is increasingly focused on symbolic gestures rather than tangible service delivery. While a...

item.title: Schwarzman Scholars program highlights global leadership impact and 10-year milestone
item.description: The article profiles the Schwarzman Scholars program, a prestigious master’s initiative based at Tsinghua University in Beijing, and highlights its role in developing future global leaders. Through ex...

item.title: Western Australia shifts focus from emissions cuts to export-led decarbonisation strategy
item.description: Western Australia’s government, led by Premier Roger Cook, has signalled a major shift in climate policy by abandoning explicit emissions reduction targets in favour of goals centred on carbon capture...

item.title: Oil Prices Climb as US-Iran Tensions Persist Over Peace Proposal
item.description: On Monday, global oil prices surged following comments from former US President Donald Trump, who described Iran’s response to a US peace proposal as 'unacceptable.' This announcement has heightened c...

item.title: Trump Rejects Iran’s Peace Proposal, Tensions Rise in Middle East
item.description: US President Donald Trump don reject Iran terms wey dem propose to end Middle East war, call am 'totally unacceptable.' This rejection fit make wahala start again after weeks of negotiation. Iran resp...

item.title: Keir Starmer under pressure as Labour MPs weigh leadership alternatives
item.description: Keir Starmer, the British Prime Minister, faces mounting pressure following poor local election results, which saw Labour lose support to Reform UK and the Greens. Around 40 Labour MPs, including supp...

item.title: Indian Crew Members from Hantavirus-Affected MV Hondius Evacuated Safely to Netherlands
item.description: The Indian Embassy in Spain has confirmed that the two Indian nationals who were crew members on the Dutch cruise ship MV Hondius, affected by a hantavirus outbreak, are healthy and asymptomatic. The ...
